title: Advance to Trafalgar Square
description: Advance to Trafalgar Square. If you pass Go, collect £200

title: Advance to Pall Mall
description: Advance to Pall Mall. If you pass Go, collect £200

title: Advance to Nearest Station (1)
description: Advance to nearest Station. If unowned, you may buy it from the Bank. If owned, pay owner twice the rental to which they are otherwise entitled

title: Advance to Nearest Station (2)
description: Advance to nearest Station. If unowned, you may buy it from the Bank. If owned, pay owner twice the rental to which they are otherwise entitled

title: Advance to Nearest Utility
description: Advance token to nearest Utility. If unowned, you may buy it from the Bank. If owned, throw dice and pay owner a total ten times the amount thrown

title: Get Out of Jail Free
description: Get Out of Jail Free. This card may be kept until needed or sold

title: Go to Jail
description: Go to Jail. Go directly to Jail, do not pass Go, do not collect £200

title: General Repairs
description: Make general repairs on all your property. For each house pay £25. For each hotel pay £100

title: Trip to Marylebone Station
description: Take a trip to Marylebone Station. If you pass Go, collect £200

title: Chairman of the Board
description: You have been elected Chairman of the Board. Pay each player £50
